entities.title: Ember Salamander
entities.excerpt: A heat-adapted amphibian observed near volcanic vents in Light No Fire. QA SSG prototype fixture — not a live database entry.
entities.body_html_sanitized:
The Ember Salamander is a community-documented creature fixture used to validate static SSG HTML output on BoundLore.

Players report sightings along basalt ridges where ground heat keeps small pools warm year-round. The salamander's orange dorsal pattern may help it blend with glowing ember cracks.

  • Habitat: volcanic foothills
  • Behavior: nocturnal foraging
  • Threat: low to explorers

entities.title: Volcanic Heat Charm
entities.excerpt: A crafted charm said to reduce heat exposure during long expeditions. QA SSG prototype fixture for static item pages.
entities.body_html_sanitized:
The Volcanic Heat Charm is a prototype item entry demonstrating sanitized static body HTML for BoundLore SSG pages.

Expedition logs describe charms woven from heat-resistant fibers and cooled basalt shards. Effects remain unconfirmed in-game; this fixture documents community expectations only.

Crafters on BoundLore track recipe evidence separately. This page does not claim verified drop locations.

entities.title: Cinder Basalt Flats
entities.excerpt: A scorched basalt plateau with fissure vents and sparse heat-tolerant flora. QA SSG prototype fixture for static biome pages.
entities.body_html_sanitized:
Cinder Basalt Flats is a biome prototype fixture showing how environment entries can ship crawler-visible HTML without a CSR loading shell.

The flats stretch between cooled lava rivers and active vent clusters. Wind carries fine ash that settles in ripple patterns across dark stone fields.

Explorers note reduced visibility during thermal updrafts. Camp placement should account for sudden temperature spikes near open fissures.
